name: Stabilize and Crop Time-Series Image Stack
description: A sequence of 20 drifting FITS images is located at ~/AstroImages/raw_sequence/. These observations suffer from severe telescope tracking drift. Align the stack to sub-pixel accuracy and crop the sequence to a region of interest that bounds only the valid data region common to all frames, completely removing any zero-value borders created by the alignment process. Export the aligned and cropped stack as a FITS image sequence to ~/AstroImages/aligned_sequence/. The final output must contain exactly 20 FITS files, perfectly stabilized, with no black padding artifacts at the edges.
